item.description: Thomas Niblock reposteó Pope Leo XIV @Pontifex · 17h Woe to those who manipulate religion and the very name of God for their own military, economic, and political gain, dragging that which is sacred into darkness and filth. #ApostolicJourney #Cameroon https:// vatican.va/content/leo-xi v/en/events/event.dir.html/content/vaticanevents/en/2026/4/16/camerun-incontro-pace.html … 18 mil 70 mil 330 mil 8 M

item.title:
jordannorris98: Tommy Rooney reposteó Jordan Norris @jordannorris98 · 10h FT: Munster Under-20 Football Championship Phase 2 Round 2
Cl
item.description:
Tommy Rooney reposteó Jordan Norris @jordannorris98 · 10h FT: Munster Under-20 Football Championship Phase 2 Round 2
Clare 2-13 (19) Waterford 2-14 (20)
Waterford’s SIXTH Munster underage football win of 2026.
Paddy McCarthy, Joe Brennan and David Nyhan outstanding
A Munster final up for grabs v Cork. 3 9 185 15 mil

item.title: tonyleen: Maurice Brosnan reposteó Tony Leen @tonyleen · 9h Many will tell u print is dead and @examinersport is wasting our tim
item.description: Maurice Brosnan reposteó Tony Leen @tonyleen · 9h Many will tell u print is dead and @examinersport is wasting our time producing preview mag for GAA Championship 2026. You will be the judge of that. It’s free with Friday’s @irishexaminer print edition and available to our subscribers. Hope u enjoy. But more importantly, support 5 28 119 12 mil
